description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a security_release:release_preparation stage with two jobs. Add a start job named security_release_release_preparation:start that runs in the security_release:release_preparation:start stage, executes bundle exec rake 'security:release_preparation:start', is triggered only when the pipeline source is pipeline, web, or api and SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE matches release_preparation or true, and must be started manually. Add a blog_post job named security_release_release_preparation:blog_post that runs in the security_release:release_preparation stage, inherits the same rules, depends on the start job, and executes bundle exec rake 'release:patch_blog_post'. Both jobs extend the common job setup and include CI token configuration.
